markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's draft content strategy for Cresta.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Approved:** GrowthX's topic cluster strategy was approved. A new cluster, "Conversational Insights," was added to target executive CX buyers and address a key strategic initiative.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=2045.0)
  - [**Prioritization Set:** Cresta provided a clear content hierarchy, prioritizing topics that win deals (e.g., AI Agents) and key verticals (Travel & Hospitality \> Healthcare).](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
  - [**Competitive Content Plan:** A cautious approach was set for competitive content, focusing on positioning over feature-by-feature comparisons. These articles will live in a separate `/guides` section to protect the main blog's brand integrity.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
  - [**Action Plan:** GrowthX will deliver a detailed content calendar and a "calibration blog" next week to test the writing guidelines and ensure the content's depth and tone are correct.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=2172.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Framework

  - [GrowthX's strategy uses topic clusters to build authority, which improves visibility in both traditional SEO and AI search (LLMs).](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [LLMs favor structured content with features like:](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [FAQ sections](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [TLDR summaries](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [Original research and statistics](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Performance will be tracked via a Looker dashboard (for referral data) and Scrunch (for LLM visibility).](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)

### Competitor Analysis & Content Gaps

  - [Cresta's blog traffic is currently driven by company news, not SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Competitors cover thematic clusters that represent Cresta's content gaps:](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
      - [AI/ML concepts & virtual agents](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
      - [Contact center automation](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
      - [Industry-specific content (healthcare, financial services, telecom)](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
      - [Foundational glossaries](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)

### Proposed Topic Clusters & Prioritization

  - [**1. Contact Center Operations:** Broad appeal, high search volume. Targets all Cresta products.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [**2. AI Agents:** High priority. A deal was recently won from a lead found on ChatGPT for this topic.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [**3. Vertical-Specific Guides:**](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
      - [**Priority Order:** 1) Travel & Hospitality, 2) Healthcare & Insurance, 3) Financial Services.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [**4. Competitive Comparisons:**](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
      - [**Tone:** Focus on Cresta's outcomes and positioning as an alternative, not on competitor deficiencies.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [**Accuracy:** Use a "Product Feature Matrix" artifact and an "accurate as of \[date\]" disclaimer.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
      - [**Review Process:** Initial review by Nicky & Devon; escalate risky content to Russell & Legal.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [**5. Agent Performance & Coaching:** Targets the Agent Assist and Conversation Intelligence products.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1987.0)
  - [**6. Conversational Insights (NEW):**](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=2070.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Added to target executive CX buyers and position Cresta as a leader in using conversations for business insights (e.g., predictive CSAT).](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=2070.0)

### Website Structure for New Content

  - [**Decision:** New SEO content, especially competitive comparisons, will live in a separate `/guides` section.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This protects the main blog's brand integrity and prevents it from being diluted by a high volume of functional SEO articles.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)
  - [**Implementation:** The `/guides` section will be linked in the main navigation (e.g., under "Resources") and footer to ensure indexability.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1886.0)

### Image Generation & Content Refresh

  - [**Image Generation:** GrowthX will generate featured images using Cresta's brand guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=2261.0)
      - [**Action:** Nicky will invite Creative Director Steve to the Slack channel for initial style calibration.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=2452.0)
  - [**Content Refresh:** GrowthX will analyze existing blog posts to identify low-hanging fruit for improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=2521.0)
      - [**Action:** Bulk-add SEO-friendly elements (FAQs, TLDRs) to existing content.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=2521.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=2172.0)
      - [Add "Conversational Insights" as a new topic cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=2070.0)
      - [Conduct in-depth keyword research for all clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=2172.0)
      - [Deliver a detailed content calendar (50+ ideas) and a "calibration blog" next week.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=2172.0)
  - [**Cresta:**](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=2508.0)
      - [Provide async feedback on the draft strategy doc.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=2508.0)
      - [Invite Steve (Creative Director) to the Slack channel for image calibration.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=2452.0)
  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
      - [Investigate direct Scrunch access for Cresta.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
      - [Analyze existing blog posts for refresh opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJ4grfLM4EXzsjxszf3yjszTwR1KjNc?tab=summary&timestamp=2521.0)
